Plural makes managing Kubernetes at scale incredibly smooth and efficient. I love how it integrates AI to automate complex DevOps tasks, saving time and reducing errors. The interface is intuitive, and the insights it provides are spot on for enterprise needs. A must-have tool for teams looking to simplify and scale their cloud infrastructure.

Super helpful and good looking tool. Lots of packages in a variety of shapes and sizes, often with multi-cloud compatibility and nifty upgrade/dependency hooks. Solid architecture and great Git-based setup with an excellent CLI.

results.title: Binary: Hiring software that is fast, simple and AI powered | Product Hunt
results.content:
Mykyta Semenov 🇺🇦🇳🇱

@shikhars\_ I’ve already talked to the team. Our main obstacle isn’t functionality, but a lot of legacy data that can’t be exported automatically.

Shikhar Saxena
Binary

Binary

Hi everyone,  
  
We are excited to announce Binary, a new kind of hiring software.   
  
Current hiring tools (ATS) are slow, bloated and expensive. We wanted to build something that's fast, simple and affordable. Binary lets you create exciting job pages, ask video questions, review faster with AI, respond to candidates quickly and much more.   
  
We are grateful to 200+ startups who joined our beta in the past few months and helped us build a product we all love using. Some of these names include Sundial, Supermemory, Lossfunk and Weaver.

Let us know what you think!

Zolani Matebese [...] Let us know what you think!

Zolani Matebese

@shikhars\_ Congrats on the launch Shikhars. Whats the one "shut up and take my money" element that you're going for?

Shikhar Saxena
Binary

Binary

@zolani\_matebese What has clicked for most of our paying users is just finding a hiring software which is super-simple and yet powerful enough to make their hiring fast and smooth.

Austin Heaton

@shikhars\_ congrats on the launch! Is it specialized mostly for the tech recruitment?

Shikhar Saxena
Binary

Binary

@austin\_heaton not really! we have people using it for pretty much any role where they're inviting inbound.   
  
In fact, some features like video questions are loved more by companies who are using it for non-tech roles like sales, support, etc.

Adarsh Bhadauria [...] Binary
